jobs.title: Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Handling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team.
 Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling.
 Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data.
 Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier.
 Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team.
 Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.

## This is you
A structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability.
 Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus.
 A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications.
 A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Driver  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Contact us
T: 
                                                                
                                    +41 81 836 80 55
                                
                                                                    

                                                                                                                                E: 
                                                                
                                    people@kulmgroup.com

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Handling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team.
 Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling.
 Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data.
 Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier.
 Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team.
 Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.

## This is you
A structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability.
 Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus.
 A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications.
 A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.

jobs.title: Assistant Event Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Assistant Event Manager (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01.

## This is what you move with us
Are you an organizational talent with a passion for high-end events? Do you thrive in challenging situations, maintaining an overview while ensuring seamless event execution? If so, you are exactly who we are looking for.As Assistant Event Manager, you will be the right hand of our Event Manager, shaping exclusive events – from elegant gala dinners to high-profile international business meetings.Your Responsibilities:Event Coordination & Execution: Oversee the entire planning process, create proposals, coordinate workflows, and ensure flawless on-site implementation.
Guest Relations & Service Excellence: Serve as the primary point of contact for clients and partners, managing every detail from initial inquiries to post-event follow-ups.
Administrative Expertise: Prepare offers, confirmations, and invoices while handling event bookings and ensuring accurate execution.
Seamless Internal Coordination: Ensure effective communication across departments to guarantee all relevant information is shared in a timely manner.
Quality Management & Innovation: Continuously refine event operations, contribute creative ideas, and stay updated on industry trends.

## This is you
Proven Experience at the Highest Level: Several years of experience in event coordination within the 5-star hospitality industry or luxury gastronomy.
Excellent Language Skills: Native or fluent German, very good English, additional languages are a plus.
Organizational Talent with an Eye for Detail: A structured approach, strong multitasking skills, and a hands-on mentality.
Passion for Hospitality: A professional demeanor, outstanding communication skills, and a keen understanding of luxury clientele.
Digital Savvy: Proficient in event management systems, MS Office, and internal hotel software.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%

This is youProactive Mindset: You notice when a shelf is empty and take initiative independently.Reliability: Punctuality and a clean, organized way of working are second nature to you.Structure: You always keep track of where everything belongs, even in the warehouse.Languages: Italian or Portuguese, plus English.

Assistant Event Manager (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01.

## This is what you move with us
Are you an organizational talent with a passion for high-end events? Do you thrive in challenging situations, maintaining an overview while ensuring seamless event execution? If so, you are exactly who we are looking for.As Assistant Event Manager, you will be the right hand of our Event Manager, shaping exclusive events – from elegant gala dinners to high-profile international business meetings.Your Responsibilities:Event Coordination & Execution: Oversee the entire planning process, create proposals, coordinate workflows, and ensure flawless on-site implementation.
Guest Relations & Service Excellence: Serve as the primary point of contact for clients and partners, managing every detail from initial inquiries to post-event follow-ups.
Administrative Expertise: Prepare offers, confirmations, and invoices while handling event bookings and ensuring accurate execution.
Seamless Internal Coordination: Ensure effective communication across departments to guarantee all relevant information is shared in a timely manner.
Quality Management & Innovation: Continuously refine event operations, contribute creative ideas, and stay updated on industry trends.

## This is you
Proven Experience at the Highest Level: Several years of experience in event coordination within the 5-star hospitality industry or luxury gastronomy.
Excellent Language Skills: Native or fluent German, very good English, additional languages are a plus.
Organizational Talent with an Eye for Detail: A structured approach, strong multitasking skills, and a hands-on mentality.
Passion for Hospitality: A professional demeanor, outstanding communication skills, and a keen understanding of luxury clientele.
Digital Savvy: Proficient in event management systems, MS Office, and internal hotel software.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.title: Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-08-01.

## This is what you move with us
You are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.
You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.
You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.
You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.
You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.
You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.
Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.

## This is you
Professional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience. 
  Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales. 
  Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus. 
  Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm. 
  Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Driver  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usHandling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team. Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling. Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data. Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier. Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team. Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.
This is youA structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus. A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications. A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-08-01.

## This is what you move with us
You are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.
You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.
You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.
You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.
You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.
You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.
Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.

## This is you
Professional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience. 
  Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales. 
  Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.

jobs.title: Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-05.

## This is what you move with us
It is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.
Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.
Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.
Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.
start June, end ca. 06.04.2027

## This is you
The early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.
Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.
Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.
Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.
Languages: Italian as well as English or German.
Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.
Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.
Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.
Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Employee Economat & Bike Lounge (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usSnack & Beverage Management: You maintain an overview and continuously restock snacks and drinks in our newly created Mountainbike Lounge.Inventory & Stock: You assist with receiving goods, organize incoming deliveries, and maintain order in the warehouse/storage room.Support: Occasional assistance with organizational tasks in the back office.
This is youProactive Mindset: You notice when a shelf is empty and take initiative independently.Reliability: Punctuality and a clean, organized way of working are second nature to you.Structure: You always keep track of where everything belongs, even in the warehouse.Languages: Italian or Portuguese, plus English.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

                                    +41 81 836 80 55

            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. descriptionByLocale.fr:
Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-05.

## This is what you move with us
It is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.
Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.
Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.
Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.
start June, end ca. 06.04.2027

## This is you
The early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.
Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.
Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.
Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.
Languages: Italian as well as English or German.
Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.
Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.
Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.
Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.description:
Chef de Partie Mitarbeiterrestaurant/ Personalkoch (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Creative & varied menu      planning – You      design fresh, healthy, and delicious meals for our employees daily.
  Highest quality &      efficiency –      You ensure that all dishes are prepared with top-quality ingredients while      optimizing processes for a smooth operation.
  Leadership & motivation – You lead your small team      with passion and professionalism, creating a positive and structured work      environment.
  Cost-effectiveness &      sustainability      – You plan menus efficiently, minimize food waste, and implement      sustainable practices.
  Hygiene & organization – You guarantee compliance      with the highest hygiene and safety standards (HACCP) in your kitchen.

## This is you
Experience in 5-star hotels  – You understand the standards of      excellent cuisine and quality.
  Passion for great food – You love transforming fresh      ingredients into creative and well-balanced dishes.
  Leadership skills & team      spirit – You      take responsibility, motivate your team, and foster a respectful work      culture.
  Organizational talent &      efficiency –      You stay on top of things even in busy moments and work in a structured      manner.
  Creativity & sustainability – You develop new ideas for      diverse menus while maintaining a responsible approach to resources.
Language: must-have: Italian, other languages are a plus

At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

  Leadership skills & team      spirit – You      take responsibility, motivate your team, and foster a respectful work      culture.
  Organizational talent &      efficiency –      You stay on top of things even in busy moments and work in a structured      manner.
  Creativity & sustainability – You develop new ideas for      diverse menus while maintaining a responsible approach to resources.

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. jobs.title: Chef de Rang  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Chef de Rang  (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-02.

## This is what you move with us
Living Hospitality: You welcome and attend to our discerning regular guests, creating unforgettable moments at the highest level.
Organizational Talent: You coordinate the service area and ensure a seamless guest experience.
Perfection in Detail: You ensure everything in the restaurant runs flawlessly.
Classy Consulting: You provide expert advice to our guests on menu selection and give knowledgeable drink recommendations.
Quality over Quantity: You guarantee top-notch service and highest guest satisfaction.
Hygiene and Safety: You always adhere to the highest hygiene and safety standards.

## This is you
MUST HAVE: excellent German, very good English, ideally Italian.
Education and Experience: You have completed training in hospitality/gastronomy or have a comparable qualification, along with several years of experience in a high-end restaurant setting.
Communication and Teamwork: You have excellent communication skills and are a team player.
Host: You have a strong customer orientation and enjoy being a host.
Resilience and Flexibility: You remain resilient and flexible, even in stressful situations.
Appearance: Your well-groomed appearance and good manners complete your profile.
Expertise: You possess comprehensive knowledge in food and beverages.
Independence: You work independently and responsibly.

## Benefits
At the Kulm Group, our employees are the key to our success. We are renowned for our impeccable service as well as our passion for high-end luxury, winter sports, and haute cuisine. With us, you will not only find the perfect platform to advance your career but also an outstanding employee experience with numerous amenities and benefits.

        
            Apply now

Chef de Rang  (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-02.

## This is what you move with us
Living Hospitality: You welcome and attend to our discerning regular guests, creating unforgettable moments at the highest level.
Organizational Talent: You coordinate the service area and ensure a seamless guest experience.
Perfection in Detail: You ensure everything in the restaurant runs flawlessly.
Classy Consulting: You provide expert advice to our guests on menu selection and give knowledgeable drink recommendations.
Quality over Quantity: You guarantee top-notch service and highest guest satisfaction.
Hygiene and Safety: You always adhere to the highest hygiene and safety standards.

## This is you
MUST HAVE: excellent German, very good English, ideally Italian.
Education and Experience: You have completed training in hospitality/gastronomy or have a comparable qualification, along with several years of experience in a high-end restaurant setting.
Communication and Teamwork: You have excellent communication skills and are a team player.
Host: You have a strong customer orientation and enjoy being a host.
Resilience and Flexibility: You remain resilient and flexible, even in stressful situations.
Appearance: Your well-groomed appearance and good manners complete your profile.
Expertise: You possess comprehensive knowledge in food and beverages.
Independence: You work independently and responsibly.

## Benefits
At the Kulm Group, our employees are the key to our success. We are renowned for our impeccable service as well as our passion for high-end luxury, winter sports, and haute cuisine. With us, you will not only find the perfect platform to advance your career but also an outstanding employee experience with numerous amenities and benefits.

jobs.description:
Chef de Rang (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
Welcome guests at the highest level and ensure the best guest experience
Leading a team of Commis de Rang and service staff
Ensuring a smooth service flow
Advising guests on the selection of food and beverages according to their preferences and restrictions
Ensuring compliance with service standards and guidelines of the hotel group
Responsible for the proper setting and decoration of tables
Active involvement in the development of new menus and food cards

Ability to motivate and guide a team

Leading a team of Commis de Rang and service staff
Ensuring a smooth service flow
Advising guests on the selection of food and beverages according to their preferences and restrictions
Ensuring compliance with service standards and guidelines of the hotel group
Responsible for the proper setting and decoration of tables
Active involvement in the development of new menus and food cards

## This is you
Completed education in the gastronomy sector or equivalent professional experience
Several years of experience in the service sector, preferably in upscale gastronomy
Strong communication skills and a friendly demeanor
Ability to motivate and guide a team
Good knowledge of wine and beverages is advantageous
High resilience and the ability to ensure excellent service even under pressure
Willingness to work flexible hours, including weekends and holidays
Very good German language skills, ideally also English or Italian

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!

jobs.title: Commis de Rang/ Assistant Waiter  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Commis de Rang/ Assistant Waiter  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Exclusive Guest Service: You will be the face of our service area, delighting our discerning guests with exceptional service. From the moment they arrive to their departure, you will be the point of contact for all their needs.
Mise-en-place Preparation: Perfect preparation is key. You will ensure that your station is immaculate and that everything is in place before the guests arrive.
Seamless Service Support: You will work hand-in-hand with your Chef de Rang to ensure a fluid and elegant service flow. This includes the professional serving and clearing of courses, as well as maintaining a watchful eye on the "silent" needs of our guests, such as water and bread service.

## This is you
Experience in Luxury Hospitality: You bring experience from renowned hotels and understand the high standards expected in a 5-star establishment.
Language Skills: You are fluent in German and/or English, ideally you speak Italian as well. Any additional languages you speak are a plus, helping you better serve our international clientele.
Excellent Manners: With your well-groomed appearance and outstanding manners, you leave a lasting impression on our guests.
Passion for Perfection: You have an eye for detail and strive for perfection in everything you do. Your enthusiasm for the job is reflected in the quality of your work.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Commis de Rang/ Assistant Waiter  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Exclusive Guest Service: You will be the face of our service area, delighting our discerning guests with exceptional service. From the moment they arrive to their departure, you will be the point of contact for all their needs.
Mise-en-place Preparation: Perfect preparation is key. You will ensure that your station is immaculate and that everything is in place before the guests arrive.
Seamless Service Support: You will work hand-in-hand with your Chef de Rang to ensure a fluid and elegant service flow. This includes the professional serving and clearing of courses, as well as maintaining a watchful eye on the "silent" needs of our guests, such as water and bread service.

## This is you
Experience in Luxury Hospitality: You bring experience from renowned hotels and understand the high standards expected in a 5-star establishment.
Language Skills: You are fluent in German and/or English, ideally you speak Italian as well. Any additional languages you speak are a plus, helping you better serve our international clientele.
Excellent Manners: With your well-groomed appearance and outstanding manners, you leave a lasting impression on our guests.
Passion for Perfection: You have an eye for detail and strive for perfection in everything you do. Your enthusiasm for the job is reflected in the quality of your work.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
