Préparation: génération de rapports de département, achat et affichage de journaux et fourniture de services de nettoyage de chaussures pour nos clients. ## Vous êtes Expérience: un solide contexte dans l'hôtellerie (de préférence dans le segment 5 étoiles) et idéalement expérience dans les quarts de nuit. Compétences informatiques: maîtrise des systèmes PMS (Opera Cloud) ainsi que des applications standard de MS Office. Langues: couramment en allemand et en anglais; la connaissance de l'italien est un avantage significatif en raison de notre emplacement et de notre clientèle. Engagement: permis de conduire valide et condition physique requise pour les rondes de sécurité et la manutention des bagages. Personnalité: un haut niveau de responsabilité, une discrétion absolue et une apparence soignée qui répond à nos normes de luxe. ## Avantages Dans le groupe Kulm, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des hébergements confortables, des repas à prix raisonnables dans le restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Chauffeur (h/f/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof ## Les personnes à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inoubliable. En tant que membre du groupe de luxe Kulm, vous êtes partie intégrante de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous faisons de chaque séjour une expérience profondément inspirante, unique et distinctive. Et dans ce but, nous embrassons notre culture: luxe discret, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous faisons que cela se réalise. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture façonnante: ## Ce que nous vous proposons Accueil chaleureux pour nos clients: avec votre amabilité et votre charme naturels, vous faites sentir chaque client chez lui dès le premier instant. Parking de voiturier: vous stationnez les véhicules de nos clients dans le garage souterrain et gérez la logistique du garage, toujours avec attention aux détails et à l'ordre. Transferts de clients: que ce soit de la télécabine ou au restaurant, vous assurez les transferts de clients avec la navette de l'hôtel et garantissez un voyage sûr et agréable. Service aux clients: chargement/déchargement des bagages des clients et exécution de petites tâches sur demande. ## Vous êtes Amabilité et charme naturels: vous pouvez anticiper les besoins de nos clients exigeants et faites tout pour rendre leur séjour aussi agréable que possible. Apparence soignée et manières excellentes: vous représentez notre hôtel avec style, impressionnez avec votre politesse professionnelle et une apparence élégante. Esprit d'équipe et flexibilité: vous aimez travailler dans une équipe dynamique, vous adaptez rapidement à diverses exigences, toujours avec un sourire. Permis de conduire valide: naturellement, vous avez un permis de conduire valide et vous vous sentez à l'aise dans les espaces de stationnement étroits et sur la route. Compétences linguistiques: idéalement, vous parlez allemand et anglais, avec des langues supplémentaires (en particulier l'italien) qui sont un avantage. ## Avantages Dans le groupe Kulm, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des hébergements confortables, des repas à prix raisonnables dans le restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Contact T: +41 81 836 80 55 E: people@kulmgroup.com

jobs.title: Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.
Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.
Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.
Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.
Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.

## This is you
Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.
Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.
Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.
Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.
Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Porter Tournant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usTransporting guest luggage during arrival and departureCleaning rooms and suites as well as public areasPerforming errands and snow removal in winterCareful handling and maintenance of machines and equipmentSupporting floor porters and participating in housekeeping meetings and training sessions
This is youProfessional experience in a similar position in luxury hotelsReliability and discretionPassion for service and enjoyment of teamworkMust have: good German or English skills, ideally additional languagesWell-groomed appearance
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Dipendente biancheria (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Penale: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10. ## Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Al Grand Hotel Kronenhof diamo valore alla massima qualità – e questo si estende anche alla nostra biancheria. Dato che i nostri tessuti vengono puliti nella lavanderia professionale del nostro hotel partner Kulm, cerchiamo una persona organizzata per garantire un flusso di lavoro regolare e un'assicurazione di qualità in loco a Pontresina. Cosa ottieni con noi: Gestione della logistica: Coordini il flusso quotidiano di biancheria (sporca/pulita) tra il Kronenhof e la lavanderia Kulm. Controllo qualità: controlli la pulizia e la completezza della biancheria in entrata, assicurandoti che i nostri elevati standard siano costantemente soddisfatti. Gestione dell'inventario: organizzi lo stoccaggio della biancheria da terra, delle uniformi e della lavanderia per gli ospiti, assicurandoti che tutti i reparti siano riforniti in tempo. Comunicazione: sei il punto di contatto diretto per il team della lavanderia del Kulm Hotel e gestisci i dettagli operativi con sicurezza. Riparazioni minori: quando necessario, ti occupi di semplici lavori di cucito o di riparazioni su uniformi e tessuti. ## Questo è il tuo talento organizzativo: mantieni una visione d'insieme anche con grandi volumi di bucato e lavori in modo strutturato ed efficiente. Consapevolezza della qualità: hai occhio per i tessuti e riconosci immediatamente quando qualcosa non soddisfa i nostri requisiti a 5 stelle. Affidabilità: la puntualità e la resistenza fisica necessaria per la movimentazione dei carrelli portabiancheria sono per voi una cosa ovvia. Giocatore di squadra: comunichi in modo chiaro e amichevole, sia internamente con l'Housekeeping che esternamente con i colleghi del Kulm. Competenze linguistiche: una buona conoscenza dell'inglese e del tedesco o dell'italiano è essenziale per il coordinamento e la documentazione. ## Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. Candidati ora ## Porter Tournant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura shaping: Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiTrasporto dei bagagli degli ospiti all'arrivo e alla partenzaPulizia di camere e suite, nonché aree pubblicheSvolgimento di commissioni e rimozione della neve in invernoAttenta gestione e manutenzione di macchine e attrezzatureSupporto ai facchini di piano e partecipazione a riunioni di pulizia e sessioni di formazione Questo sei tuEsperienza professionale in una posizione simile in hotel di lussoAffidabilità e discrezionePassione per il servizio e piacere del lavoro di squadraDeve avere: buone competenze in tedesco o inglese, idealmente altre lingueAspetto curatoVantaggiNel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Assistente responsabile prenotazioni (m/l/g) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura di modellamento: questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiSei la voce del nostro hotel: sia per telefono che per e-mail, crei offerte irresistibili, confermi le prenotazioni e garantisci che i follow-up siano gestiti con precisione, il tutto in linea con gli standard LHW e ISO. Pensi in termini di occupazione e opportunità: mantieni il nostro piano di prenotazioni accurato e aggiornato, contribuendo attivamente all'utilizzo ottimale del nostro inventario delle camere. Dai vita ai numeri: in stretta collaborazione con l'Executive Assistant Manager e il Front Office Manager, sviluppi previsioni e report essenziali per la pianificazione quotidiana. Sei meticoloso con i dati: i profili degli ospiti e i database sono gestiti con cura e discrezione: struttura e conformità fanno parte del tuo DNA. Sei al passo con i tempi: dalla gestione del sistema Channel Manager al perfezionamento continuo dei nostri standard ISO e RIMS, garantisci operazioni fluide e porti nuove idee sul tavolo. Trasformi il potenziale in prestazioni: l'upselling è più di un compito per te: è un modo per migliorare il viaggio degli ospiti e creare un valore aggiunto significativo. Perché unirsi a noi? Perché farai parte di uno degli hotel più rinomati della Svizzera: un luogo in cui non solo lavori, ma contribuisci a plasmare il futuro. Sarai circondato da professionisti appassionati e sperimenterai una cultura di squadra definita da eleganza, autenticità e collaborazione. Questo sei tu Background professionale: hai completato la formazione professionale nel settore dell'ospitalità o in un settore commerciale - idealmente nell'ambito dell'ospitalità di lusso - e offri diversi anni di esperienza rilevante. Mentalità di vendita: comprendi cosa guida le decisioni di prenotazione e come migliorare l'esperienza degli ospiti attraverso la vendita strategica delle camere. Competenze linguistiche: Parli e scrivi fluentemente in tedesco e inglese; la conoscenza aggiuntiva del francese o dell'italiano costituisce un vantaggio. Compostezza e chiarezza: sia sotto pressione che nella comunicazione diretta con l'ospite, rimani professionale, efficiente e cordiale. Spinta e orientamento alla crescita: sei desideroso non solo di soddisfare le aspettative, ma di migliorare i processi e investire nel tuo sviluppo. Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Impiegato d'ufficio - Steward (inizia immediatamente) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura dello shaping: questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi. Cerchiamo un supporto energico per il nostro moderno ristorante per il personale, Capricorn, che è stato costruito poco meno di un anno fa. Tu sei il cuore delle nostre operazioni dietro le quinte, garantendo non solo una pulizia impeccabile ma anche supportando attivamente il nostro team di cucina nelle preparazioni culinarie. I tuoi compiti: Supporto in cucina: assisti attivamente nei lavori di preparazione (mise-en-place), come il taglio professionale delle verdure e altri compiti preparatori. Ordine e pulizia: garantisci pulizia e organizzazione impeccabili nella nostra cucina moderna e nel back office del ristorante Capricorn. Gestione attenta: sei responsabile della pulizia, della cura e della conservazione precise dei prodotti porcellane, bicchieri, posate e utensili da cucina (pentole e padelle). Coordinamento e organizzazione: lavori a stretto contatto con i team di cucina e di servizio per garantire operazioni senza intoppi, anche durante le ore di punta. Questo sei tuEsperienza professionale: porti una solida esperienza nel settore della gastronomia, idealmente da un ambiente alberghiero a 4 o 5 stelle. Interesse per le arti culinarie: ti piace maneggiare ingredienti freschi e sei felice di supportare il team nella preparazione del cibo. Competenze linguistiche: comunichi con sicurezza in tedesco, inglese o italiano. Personalità: sei caratterizzato da flessibilità e capacità di lavorare bene in squadra. Apprezzi un ambiente dinamico e ti piace lavorare all'interno di un team motivato. Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Contattaci T: +41 81 836 80 55 E: people@kulmgroup.com ## Ascoltaci Iscriviti Link Colophon
descriptionByLocale.de: Wäschemitarbeiter (Teilzeit 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50 %. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-Monats-Vertrag. Stellenantritt: 10.06.2026. ## Das bewegen Sie mit uns Im Grand Hotel Kronenhof legen wir Wert auf höchste Qualität – auch bei unserer Bettwäsche. Da unsere Textilien in der professionellen Wäscherei unseres Partnerhotels Kulm gereinigt werden, suchen wir eine organisierte Person, die in Pontresina für einen reibungslosen Arbeitsablauf und die Qualitätssicherung vor Ort sorgt. Was Sie bei uns erreichen: Logistikmanagement: Sie koordinieren den täglichen Wäschefluss (verschmutzt/sauber) zwischen dem Kronenhof und der Wäscherei Kulm. Qualitätskontrolle: Sie überprüfen eingehende Wäsche auf Sauberkeit und Vollständigkeit und stellen so sicher, dass unsere hohen Standards stets eingehalten werden. Bestandsverwaltung: Sie organisieren die Lagerung von Bodenwäsche, Uniformen und Gästewäsche und stellen sicher, dass alle Abteilungen pünktlich beliefert werden. Kommunikation: Sie sind der direkte Ansprechpartner für das Wäschereiteam im Kulm Hotel und kümmern sich souverän um betriebliche Details. Kleinere Reparaturen: Bei Bedarf kümmerst du dich um einfache Näharbeiten oder Reparaturen an Uniformen und Textilien. ## Das ist Ihr Organisationstalent: Sie behalten auch bei großen Wäschemengen den Überblick und arbeiten strukturiert und effizient. Qualitätsbewusstsein: Du hast ein Gespür für Textilien und erkennst sofort, wenn etwas nicht unseren 5-Sterne-Anforderungen entspricht. Zuverlässigkeit: Pünktlichkeit und die nötige körperliche Ausdauer im Umgang mit Wäschewagen sind für Sie selbstverständlich. Teamplayer: Du kommunizierst freundlich und klar – sowohl intern mit dem Housekeeping als auch extern mit den Kollegen im Kulm. Sprachkenntnisse: Gute Englisch- und Deutsch- oder Italienischkenntnisse sind für die Koordination und Dokumentation unerlässlich. ## Vorteile Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. Gelassenheit & Klarheit: Ob unter Druck oder in der direkten Gästekommunikation, Sie bleiben professionell, effizient und herzlich. Du bist das Herzstück unserer Abläufe hinter den Kulissen und sorgst nicht nur für einwandfreie Sauberkeit, sondern unterstützt auch aktiv unser Küchenteam bei den kulinarischen Zubereitungen. Deine Aufgaben: Küchenunterstützung: Du hilfst aktiv bei Vorbereitungsarbeiten (mise-en-place), wie dem fachgerechten Schneiden von Gemüse und anderen Vorbereitungsarbeiten. descriptionByLocale.fr: Employé de linge (temps partiel 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Grisons). Pensée : 50 %. Vertrag : 10-Monats-Stelle / Contrat de 10 mois. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10. ## C'est ce que vous déménagez chez nous Au Grand Hôtel Kronenhof, nous accordons une grande importance à la qualité la plus élevée – et cela s'étend également à notre linge. Puisque nos textiles sont nettoyés dans la blanchisserie professionnelle de notre hôtel partenaire, le Kulm, nous recherchons une personne organisée pour assurer un flux de travail fluide et une assurance qualité sur place à Pontresina.Ce que vous réalisez avec nous :Gestion logistique : Vous coordonnez le flux quotidien de linge (sale/propre) entre le Kronenhof et la blanchisserie Kulm. Contrôle qualité : Vous inspectez le linge entrant pour en vérifier la propreté et l'intégralité, garantissant ainsi que nos normes élevées sont systématiquement respectées. Gestion des stocks : Vous organisez le stockage du linge de sol, des uniformes et du linge invité, en veillant à ce que tous les départements soient approvisionnés à temps. Communication : Vous êtes le point de contact direct de l'équipe de blanchisserie de l'hôtel Kulm et gérez les détails opérationnels en toute confiance. Petites réparations : Lorsque cela est nécessaire, vous vous occupez de tâches simples de couture ou de réparations d'uniformes et de textiles. ## C'est votre talent organisationnel : Vous gardez une vue d'ensemble même avec de gros volumes de linge et travaillez de manière structurée et efficace. Conscience de la qualité : Vous avez l'œil pour les textiles et reconnaissez immédiatement quand quelque chose ne répond pas à nos exigences 5 étoiles. Fiabilité : La ponctualité et l'endurance physique nécessaires à la manipulation des chariots à linge sont pour vous une évidence. Joueur d'équipe : Vous communiquez de manière amicale et claire, tant en interne avec Housekeeping qu'en externe avec vos collègues du Kulm. Compétences linguistiques : Une bonne connaissance de l'anglais et de l'allemand ou de l'italien est essentielle pour la coordination et la documentation. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre réussite. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous Transporter les bagages des invités à l'arrivée et au départ Nettoyer les chambres et les suites ainsi que les espaces publics Effectuer les courses et le déneigement en hiver Manipulation et entretien soigneux des machines et des équipements Soutenir les porteurs d'étage et participer aux réunions d'entretien ménager et aux sessions de formation Vous êtes Expérience professionnelle dans un poste similaire dans des hôtels de luxe Fiabilité et discrétion Passion pour le service et le plaisir du travail d'équipe Doit avoir : de bonnes compétences en allemand ou en anglais, idéalement des langues supplémentairesUne apparence soignée AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : c'est ce que vous faites avec nous. Vous êtes la voix de notre hôtel : que ce soit par téléphone ou par e-mail, vous élaborez des offres attrayantes, confirmez les réservations et veillez à ce que les suivis soient traités avec précision, le tout conformément aux normes LHW et ISO. Office Manager, vous élaborez des prévisions et des rapports essentiels à la planification quotidienne. Vous êtes méticuleux avec les données : les profils des clients et les bases de données sont gérés avec soin et discrétion – la structure et la conformité font partie de votre ADN. nous ? Parce que vous ferez partie de l’un des hôtels les plus renommés de Suisse – un endroit où vous ne vous contentez pas de travailler, vous contribuez à façonner l’avenir. Vous serez entouré de professionnels passionnés et ferez l’expérience d’une culture d’équipe définie par l’élégance, l’authenticité et la collaboration. C'est vousParcours professionnel : Vous avez suivi une formation professionnelle dans l'hôtellerie ou dans un domaine commercial – idéalement dans l'hôtellerie de luxe – et possédez plusieurs années d'expérience pertinente. Esprit de vente : vous comprenez ce qui motive les décisions de réservation et comment améliorer l'expérience client grâce à la vente stratégique de chambres. Compétences linguistiques : Vous parlez et écrivez couramment l'allemand et l'anglais ; une connaissance supplémentaire du français ou de l'italien est un plus. Calme et clarté : Que ce soit sous pression ou dans une communication directe avec les clients, vous restez professionnel, efficace et chaleureux. Orientation dynamisme et croissance : vous êtes désireux non seulement de répondre aux attentes, mais également d'améliorer les processus et d'investir dans votre propre développement. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : c'est ce que vous faites avec nous. Nous recherchons un soutien énergique pour notre restaurant d'entreprise moderne, Capricorn, qui a été nouvellement construit il y a un peu moins d'un an. Vous êtes au cœur de nos opérations en coulisses, assurant non seulement une propreté irréprochable, mais soutenant également activement notre équipe de cuisine dans les préparations culinaires.Vos tâches :Soutien en cuisine : Vous participez activement aux travaux de préparation (mise en place), tels que la découpe professionnelle des légumes et autres tâches préparatoires.Ordre et propreté : Vous assurez une propreté et une organisation sans faille dans notre cuisine moderne ainsi que dans le back-office du restaurant Capricorn.Manipulation soigneuse : Vous êtes responsable du nettoyage précis, entretien et stockage de la vaisselle, de la verrerie, des couverts et des ustensiles de cuisine (casseroles et poêles).Coordination et organisation : Vous travaillez en étroite collaboration avec les équipes de cuisine et de service pour assurer le bon fonctionnement, même pendant les heures de pointe. C'est vousExpérience professionnelle : Vous apportez une solide expérience dans le secteur de la gastronomie, idéalement issue d'un environnement hôtelier 4 ou 5 étoiles.Intérêt pour les arts culinaires : Vous aimez manipuler des ingrédients frais et êtes heureux de soutenir l'équipe dans la préparation des repas.Compétences linguistiques : Vous communiquez avec assurance en allemand, anglais ou italien.Personnalité : Vous vous caractérisez par votre flexibilité et votre capacité à bien travailler en équipe. Vous appréciez un environnement dynamique et aimez travailler au sein d’une équipe motivée. AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Contactez-nous T: +41 81 836 80 55 E: people@kulmgroup.com ## Écoutez-nous Abonnez-vous Liens Mentions légales

jobs.title: Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Maître de Rang (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01.

## This is what you move with us
You confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.
You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.
You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.
You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.
You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.
You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.

## This is you
A completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.
Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.
Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.
Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.
Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.
Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.
Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Employee Economat & Bike Lounge (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usSnack & Beverage Management: You maintain an overview and continuously restock snacks and drinks in our newly created Mountainbike Lounge.Inventory & Stock: You assist with receiving goods, organize incoming deliveries, and maintain order in the warehouse/storage room.Support: Occasional assistance with organizational tasks in the back office.
This is youProactive Mindset: You notice when a shelf is empty and take initiative independently.Reliability: Punctuality and a clean, organized way of working are second nature to you.Structure: You always keep track of where everything belongs, even in the warehouse.Languages: Italian or Portuguese, plus English.

jobs.title: Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-10-01.

## This is what you move with us
Front Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.
Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.
Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.
Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.
Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.

## This is you
Experience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.
Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.
Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.
Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Driver  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usHandling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team. Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling. Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data. Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier. Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team. Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.
This is youA structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus. A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications. A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Contact us
T: 
                                                                
                                    +41 81 836 80 55

descriptionByLocale.it: Nachtportier/ Revisore notturno (m/l/g) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Penale: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-10-01. ## Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Front Office e Ospiti: gestire check-in posticipati e check-out anticipati, fornire assistenza professionale agli ospiti via telefono e soddisfare le richieste speciali degli ospiti. Servizio di ritiro e consegna bagagli: parcheggio dei veicoli degli ospiti nel garage e assistenza con il servizio bagagli e il rooming. Audit notturno: completamento della chiusura giornaliera del sistema (Opera Cloud), verifica dei report dei punti vendita e gestione della gestione fisica del contante per il reparto contabilità. Sicurezza e controllo: conduzione di controlli di sicurezza regolari, monitoraggio del pannello di allarme antincendio e garanzia di pace e tranquillità notturna in tutti i locali. Preparazione: generazione di rapporti di reparto, acquisto e pubblicazione di giornali e fornitura di servizi di lustrascarpe per i nostri ospiti. ## Questa è la tua esperienza: un solido background nel settore alberghiero (preferibilmente nel segmento 5 stelle) e idealmente una precedente esperienza nei turni notturni. Competenza IT: gestione sicura dei sistemi PMS (Opera Cloud) e delle applicazioni MS Office standard. Lingue: fluente tedesco e inglese; la conoscenza dell'italiano è un vantaggio significativo data la nostra posizione e la nostra clientela. Impegno: patente di guida valida e idoneità fisica richiesta per i controlli di sicurezza e la movimentazione dei bagagli. Personalità: un alto senso di responsabilità, assoluta discrezione e un aspetto raffinato che soddisfa i nostri standard di lusso. ## Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. Candidati ora ## Assistente responsabile prenotazioni (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura di modellamento: questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiSei la voce del nostro hotel: sia per telefono che per e-mail, crei offerte irresistibili, confermi le prenotazioni e garantisci che i follow-up siano gestiti con precisione, il tutto in linea con gli standard LHW e ISO. Pensi in termini di occupazione e opportunità: mantieni il nostro piano di prenotazioni accurato e aggiornato, contribuendo attivamente all'utilizzo ottimale del nostro inventario delle camere. Dai vita ai numeri: in stretta collaborazione con l'Executive Assistant Manager e il Front Office Manager, sviluppi previsioni e report essenziali per la pianificazione quotidiana. Sei meticoloso con i dati: i profili degli ospiti e i database sono gestiti con cura e discrezione: struttura e conformità fanno parte del tuo DNA. Sei al passo con i tempi: dalla gestione del sistema Channel Manager al perfezionamento continuo dei nostri standard ISO e RIMS, garantisci operazioni fluide e porti nuove idee sul tavolo. Trasformi il potenziale in prestazioni: l'upselling è più di un compito per te: è un modo per migliorare il viaggio degli ospiti e creare un valore aggiunto significativo. Perché unirsi a noi? Perché farai parte di uno degli hotel più rinomati della Svizzera: un luogo in cui non solo lavori, ma contribuisci a plasmare il futuro. Sarai circondato da professionisti appassionati e sperimenterai una cultura di squadra definita da eleganza, autenticità e collaborazione. Questo sei tu Background professionale: hai completato la formazione professionale nel settore dell'ospitalità o in un settore commerciale - idealmente nell'ambito dell'ospitalità di lusso - e offri diversi anni di esperienza rilevante. Mentalità di vendita: comprendi cosa guida le decisioni di prenotazione e come migliorare l'esperienza degli ospiti attraverso la vendita strategica delle camere. Competenze linguistiche: Parli e scrivi fluentemente in tedesco e inglese; la conoscenza aggiuntiva del francese o dell'italiano costituisce un vantaggio. Compostezza e chiarezza: sia sotto pressione che nella comunicazione diretta con l'ospite, rimani professionale, efficiente e cordiale. Spinta e orientamento alla crescita: sei desideroso non solo di soddisfare le aspettative, ma di migliorare i processi e investire nel tuo sviluppo. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nousNous recherchons un soutien énergique pour notre restaurant moderne, Capricorne, qui a été construit il y a un peu moins d'un an. Vous êtes le cœur de nos opérations en coulisses, assurant non seulement une propreté impeccable, mais aussi un soutien actif à notre équipe de cuisine avec des préparations culinaires. Vos tâches:Cuisine Appui : Vous participez activement aux travaux de préparation (mise en place), tels que la coupe professionnelle de légumes et d'autres tâches préparatoires. Ordre et propreté: Vous assurez une propreté et une organisation parfaites dans notre cuisine moderne ainsi que dans le bureau arrière du restaurant Capricorne. Manipulation soignée : Vous êtes responsable du nettoyage, de l'entretien et du stockage précis de la porcelaine, de la verrerie, des couverts et des ustensiles de cuisine (pots et casseroles). Coordination et organisation : Vous travaillez en étroite collaboration avec les équipes de cuisine et de service afin d'assurer un bon fonctionnement et une bonne gestion; même pendant les heures de pointe. Voici votre expérience professionnelle : Vous apportez une expérience solide du secteur de la gastronomie, idéalement d'un environnement hôtelier 4 ou 5 étoiles. Intérêts dans Culinary Arts : Vous aimez manipuler des ingrédients frais et êtes heureux de soutenir l'équipe avec la préparation des aliments. Compétences linguistiques : Vous communiquez avec confiance en allemand, en anglais ou en italien. Personnalité : Vous êtes caractérisé par la flexibilité et la capacité de bien travailler dans une équipe. Vous appréciez un environnement dynamique et aimez travailler au sein d'une équipe motivée. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Superviseur Stewarding (m/p/p) Hôtel Kulm 100% Les gens à 1800m au dessus du niveau de la mer façonnent le voyage de montagne de luxe. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : C'est ce que vous déplacez avec nousVous développez avec des processus cristallins, une hygiène impeccable et un travail d'équipe de niveau supérieur 5 étoiles ? Devenez la force motrice de nos expériences culinaires et assurez des opérations impeccables dans le back-of-house. Vos responsabilités : Poste et devoir Planification à travers plusieurs points de vente (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, événements externes) – vous orchestrez des opérations sans heurts de mise en place à la panne. Leadership & Coaching de l'équipe de sélection : séances d'information quotidiennes, normes claires, présence motivante – et lorsque la pression est exercée, vous dirigez en travaillant main dans la main. Hygiène et qualité Assurance au plus haut niveau (conformité HACCP) : inspections, documentation et formation pour garantir des normes sans tache. Lave-vaisselle et gestion de l'équipement : utilisation efficace des installations modernes, des soins et de l'entretien, agissant comme un lien clé entre la cuisine, le service et les événements. Inventory & Cost Control: garder une trace des stocks, des produits chimiques et des consommables; assurer des processus efficaces sans temps d'arrêt. Excellence de l'événement : logistique pour les fonctions à grande échelle, mise en place de stations de retour et gestion rapide des redressements. C'est vousExpérience en hospitalité de luxe / gîte à Stewarding ou Back-of-House – idéalement dans un rôle de supervision ou de gestion adjointe. L'état d'esprit pratique & aperçu: vous prenez des décisions intelligentes, restez calme dans les heures de pointe, et prenez possession. Compétences en leadership et en communication. Une mentalité pratique : proactive, orientée vers la solution et un modèle pour la propreté, l'ordre et l'efficacité. Bonne connaissance de l'hygiène et de la technologie : expertise HACCP, connaissance de la technologie de nettoyage et confiance dans les outils de planification et de bureau. Flexibilité : volonté de travailler en équipe, week-ends et événements de soutien – vous profitez du dynamisme d'une propriété de luxe animée. Langues: portugais ou italien ainsi que l'anglais. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Rembourrage (m/w/j) Hôtel Kulm 100% Les personnes à 1800m au-dessus du niveau de la mer façonnent le voyage de montagne de luxe. jobs.title: Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Creating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.
A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.
Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.
Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.

## This is you
Holder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.
Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.
Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.
An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Florist (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usResponsible for all floral arrangements in our hotel, including creating centerpieces, bouquets, etc.Decorating public spaces not only for daily use but also for special occasions such as holidays, gala events, private functions, etc.Organizing and advising on outdoor landscapingProper care of flowers and green plantsProcurement of all flowers, plants, and materialsConcept development and implementation while adhering to the specified budget
This is youYou have successfully completed training in floristry and have several years of experience (preferably in the hotel industry)With a creative flair, you know how to delight our guests with your floral decorations and create an impressive atmosphere and unique ambiance within and outside our luxury hotelYou are flexible, appreciate good communication, and are accustomed to working independently.Even under pressure, you remain composed and calm, and you have a natural and friendly demeanor towards guests and colleagues.Languages: English or German
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Florist (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usThe Kulm Hotel is world-renowned for its magnificent halls and meticulous attention to detail. As the right hand to our Head Florist, you will play a key role in transforming our hotel into a blooming masterpiece. You are more than a florist – you are an ambassador of aesthetics and elegance.Your Mission:Creative Staging: You will take a leading role in the entire floral design—from delicate table arrangements to grand, imposing bouquets for our most exclusive suites.Event Highlights: Showcase your skills in large-scale floral design during glamorous weddings, gala evenings, and major seasonal projects (such as our legendary Christmas and New Year's Eve decorations).Perfection in Detail: You ensure a consistently flawless appearance of all arrangements and green plants, both indoors and outdoors.Taking Responsibility: You support the department head operationally, coordinate flower deliveries, and ensure that our high quality standards are felt in every single arrangement.Start Date: June 1st, 2026 
This is youFoundation: You have a completed vocational training as a Florist and initial professional experience in the field.Creative Passion: You have a sharp eye for colors, shapes, and current trends. Your goal is to create an "imposing atmosphere" for our international guests.Composure: Even during major events and high-volume periods, you work precisely and efficiently, always maintaining an eye for the smallest detail.Personality: Your appearance is as polished as your floral work. You are a proactive communicator within the team and a warm point of contact for our guests.Languages: You are able to communicate effectively in either German or English.Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a stage for your creativity in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Become part of a team that values true craftsmanship, encourages initiative, and thrives in a culture of mutual respect and team spirit.Are you ready to make the Kulm bloom? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Spa Therapist (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usPamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area.
This is youCompleted training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Guardia di vita (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. # Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Creare momenti di piscina perfetti: Garantisci operazioni fluide nella piscina e nella zona sauna mantenendo ogni dettaglio in vista. Un ospite a cuore: con un sorriso caldo, accogliete i nostri ospiti e badate a loro attentamente in tutta la zona spa e piscina. Igiene al massimo livello: Mantenete la pulizia e l'ordine in tutto il centro benessere e fate controlli di qualità giornalieri. Momenti di benessere: con le tue competenze aggiuntive in infusioni di sauna, palestra di acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i nostri ospiti più piccoli, contribuisci attivamente alla loro esperienza di relax e gioia in acqua. # Questo è il titolare del “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) con solida conoscenza di pronto soccorso. Esperienza nelle operazioni in piscina e competenze nella conduzione di infusioni di sauna, palestra acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i bambini. Eccellente tedesco e inglese competenze; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio. Una personalità attenta e calorosa con un forte senso di servizio e quella speciale cosa che delizia gli ospiti. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. Applicare ora ## Fiorista (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che si muove con noiRisponsabile per tutte le composizioni floreali nel nostro hotel, tra cui la creazione di pezzi centrali, mazzi di fiori, ecc. Decorare spazi pubblici non solo per uso quotidiano ma anche per occasioni speciali come feste, eventi di gala, funzioni private, ecc. Organizzazione e consulenza su paesaggi esterni Cura corretta di fiori e piante verdi Approvvigionamento di tutti i fiori, le piante e i materiali Sviluppo e implementazione del concetto, aderendo al bilancio specificato Questo è il tuo Hai completato con successo la formazione in fioristi e hanno diversi anni di esperienza (preferibilmente nel settore alberghiero) Con un tocco creativo, sai come deliziare i nostri ospiti con le tue decorazioni floreali e creare un'atmosfera impressionante e un'atmosfera unica dentro e fuori il nostro hotel di lusso Sei flessibile, apprezzi la buona comunicazione, e sono abituati a lavorare indipendentemente. Anche sotto pressione, si rimane composti e calmi, e si dispone di un demeanor naturale e amichevole verso gli ospiti e colleghi. Lingue: Inglese o Tedesco Vantaggi A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Fiorista (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno plasmando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che si muove con noiIl Kulm Hotel è di fama mondiale per le sue magnifiche sale e meticolosa attenzione ai dettagli. Come la mano destra al nostro fiorista capo, si giocherà un ruolo chiave nel trasformare il nostro hotel in un capolavoro fiorente. Sei più di un fiorista – sei un ambasciatore di estetica ed eleganza. La vostra missione: Creative Staging: Prenderai un ruolo di primo piano nell'intero design floreale—dall'allestimento di tavoli delicati a grandi mazzi imponenti per le nostre suite più esclusive. Eventi: Mostra le tue competenze nel design floreale su larga scala durante matrimoni glamour, serate di gala e grandi progetti stagionali (come le nostre decorazioni natalizie e Capodanno). Perfezione in dettaglio: Si garantisce un aspetto costantemente impeccabile di tutti gli arrangiamenti e piante verdi, sia all'interno che all'esterno. Assumere la responsabilità: Sostiene il capo reparto in modo operativo, coordina le consegne di fiori, e assicurarsi che i nostri standard di alta qualità sono sentiti in ogni singolo accordo. Data di inizio: 1 giugno, 2026 Questo e' il tuo libro. Hai una formazione professionale completa come fiorista e esperienza professionale iniziale nel settore. Passione creativa: Hai un occhio affilato per colori, forme e tendenze attuali. Il vostro obiettivo è quello di creare un'atmosfera "migliorante" per i nostri ospiti internazionali. Composure: Anche durante eventi importanti e periodi ad alto volume, si lavora con precisione ed efficienza, mantenendo sempre un occhio per i minimi dettagli. Personalità: Il tuo aspetto è lucido come il tuo lavoro floreale. Sei un comunicatore proattivo all'interno del team e un punto di contatto caldo per i nostri ospiti. Lingue: Siete in grado di comunicare efficacemente in tedesco o in inglese. Perché il gruppo Kulm? Vi offriamo un palcoscenico per la vostra creatività in una delle posizioni più esclusive del mondo. Diventa parte di un team che valorizza la vera artigianalità, incoraggia l'iniziativa e prospera in una cultura del rispetto reciproco e dello spirito di squadra. Sei pronto a far fiorire il Kulm? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la vostra applicazione! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. ## This is what you move with us
Transporting guest luggage during arrival and departure
Cleaning rooms and suites as well as public areas
Performing errands and snow removal in winter
Careful handling and maintenance of machines and equipment
Supporting floor porters and participating in housekeeping meetings and training sessions

## This is you
Professional experience in a similar position in luxury hotels
Reliability and discretion
Passion for service and enjoyment of teamwork
Must have: good German or English skills, ideally additional languages
Well-groomed appearance

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    50%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usAt the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.
This is youOrganizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
